Off Calendar Mar-02-2015 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Feb-05-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Jeffrey G. Jacobs, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, MEMORYTEN, INC., a California corporation.

No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) CHRIS KILDAY, an individual.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Kennith Olsen sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $37,558.96
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $1,800.00
Costs: $554.20
Total Judgment in the amount of $39,913.16
Judgment signed in open court.
